Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3F00 "CASTOR-3F00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Castor.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Performed the following patches to remove the disk access for highscore loading and saving: 1. NOP'd out the call to the kernal load routine ($FFD5) at $3F19 2. Changed the SEI instruction at $3E00 to RTS to force an immediate return from the highscore saving routine without performing any disk access
